message:
feat(fp-frame,fp-groupby): add DataFrame where/mask/iterrows/itertuples/items/assign/pipe methods

Implements 7 new DataFrame methods for pandas feature parity:
- where_cond(cond, other): element-wise conditional replacement
- mask(cond, other): inverse conditional replacement
- iterrows(): row iteration as (label, row_data) pairs
- itertuples(): row iteration as (label, values) tuples
- items(): column iteration as (name, Series) pairs
- assign(assignments): add/overwrite columns
- pipe(func): function application for method chaining

Also adds missing GroupBy imports and 10 new tests covering all methods.

bd-2iu3, bd-2in2, bd-bwg5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
